creator: sheldonh@iafrica.com
text:
Hi,

Some suggestions to improve the odds of someone looking at your PR:

1) Use ${X11BASE}/bin instead of /usr/X11R6/bin in your Makefile diff.

2) Are you sure nas is a BUILD_DEPENDency and not a RUN_DEPENDency?

3) Submit proper diffs, not a tarball, as per the instructions in
   section 4.7.7 of the FreeBSD Handbook.

Ciao,
Sheldon.
